headline: How Investors May Respond To General Mills (GIS) $1.75 Billion Impairment And Surprise Annual Loss
summary: In the fourth quarter of fiscal 2026, General Mills reported a goodwill and intangible impairment of US$1.75 billion, turning previously positive results into a net loss of US$2,007.9 million despite modestly higher quarterly sales of US$4,609.6 million. At the same time, the company affirmed its quarterly dividend of US$0.61 per share and completed a multi-year buyback of more than 73 million shares, underscoring an ongoing commitment to cash returns even as full-year sales eased to...
